search.title: Search
search.description: Search across projects, stories, tasks, notes and comments.
search.hint: Type at least two characters to search.

projects.emptyHelp: Create your first project to start tracking stories and tasks.
projects.noStories: No stories yet — group related tasks with "Add story".
projects.noNotes: No notes attached to this project yet.
projects.emptyDescription: No description yet — click to add one.

stories.noTasks: No tasks yet — break this story down with "Add task".
stories.emptyDescription: No description yet — click to add one.

tasks.noSubtasks: No subtasks yet — break this task down with "Add subtask".
tasks.emptyDescription: No description yet — click to add one.
tasks.emptyResult: No result yet — click to add one.

comments.heading: Comments
comments.empty: No comments yet. Use this for follow-ups, decisions, or quick notes.

notes.indexSubtitle: Standalone notes, independent of projects and tasks.
notes.emptyHelp: Notes live outside the project hierarchy — use them for quick thoughts, references or one-off context.
notes.emptyBody: Empty note — click to start writing.

board.subtitle: All stories, tasks and subtasks across this project grouped by status.
board.emptyState: Nothing to show yet — create stories and tasks first.

project.title: Delete this project?
project.message: Everything inside it — stories, tasks, subtasks, comments and attached notes — will be deleted too. This cannot be undone.

story.title: Delete this story?
story.message: All tasks and subtasks under this story, including their comments, will be deleted too. This cannot be undone.

task.title: Delete this task?
task.message: Any subtasks below it and their comments will be deleted too. This cannot be undone.

subtask.title: Delete this subtask?
subtask.message: Any nested subtasks and their comments will be deleted too. This cannot be undone.

settings.heading: Settings
settings.subtitle: Device identity, paired peers and preferences will live here.

language.heading: Language
language.description: Choose the language used across the app.

appearance.heading: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose a colour theme. "System" follows your OS light/dark preference automatically.

deadlines.heading: Deadlines
deadlines.description: Stories and tasks that are not yet done show a coloured left border on their card based on how close the due date is. Past due is red, within the threshold below is yellow, otherwise green.

mcp.heading: MCP server (for agents)
mcp.description: Expose this app's data over a local Model Context Protocol server so an AI agent can read and (optionally) modify your tasks. Disabled by default for security. The server only binds to 127.0.0.1 so it is not reachable from the network.
mcp.modeOffDescription: No MCP server. Agents cannot connect.
mcp.modeReadonlyDescription: Agents can list and inspect data but not create, update or delete anything.
mcp.modeFullDescription: Agents can create, update and delete projects, stories, tasks and comments.
mcp.exposeLanDescription: Lets other devices on the same Wi-Fi/LAN reach this server so they can pull your data via the Sync section. While enabled, the server binds to all interfaces.
mcp.exposeLanWarning: Anyone on this network who has the URL and token below can read your data (and modify it if MCP mode is Full). Don't enable this on untrusted networks like cafés or coworking Wi-Fi.
mcp.lanUrlUnknown: LAN URL unavailable — could not detect a local IP.

sync.heading: Sync from peer
sync.description: Pull projects, stories, tasks, comments and notes from another Smart-Organizer instance that has MCP enabled. Only entities whose id doesn't already exist locally are imported — your local edits and deletions are never overwritten.
sync.discoveredEmpty: No peers found yet. Make sure the other instance has MCP on and "Expose to local network" enabled.
sync.tokenLabel: Bearer token (only if the peer exposes to LAN)
sync.tokenPlaceholder: Paste the token shown on the peer's MCP settings
sync.empty: Peer has no data to pull.
sync.upToDate: Already up to date ({{skipped}} entities skipped).

application.heading: Application
application.description: Closing the window via the X minimises Organizer to the tray. Use this to actually shut it down.

dangerZone.heading: Danger zone
dangerZone.description: Permanently delete all projects, stories, tasks, comments and paired peers. This cannot be undone.
dangerZone.dialogDescription: All data on this device will be wiped: projects, stories, tasks, comments, sync state. This is irreversible. Type {{token}} below to confirm.

systemCheck.heading: System check
systemCheck.subtitle: Optional tools that unlock extra features. Everything below is opt-in — the app works fine without them.

about.heading: About
about.description: A simple tool that helps organize tasks, projects and helps to keep track of things with notes.
about.licenseDescription: PolyForm Noncommercial 1.0.0 — free for personal / noncommercial use. Commercial use requires a separate license; contact
